title: Squirrel Removal in Throgs Neck, Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Throgs Neck, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving waterfront homes. Call today!
intro: Throgs Neck's beautiful waterfront homes and tree-lined streets create the perfect habitat for squirrels seeking shelter in attics and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout this peninsular Bronx neighborhood, protecting your property from these persistent rodents. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges faced by Throgs Neck homeowners, from classic colonials to modern waterfront properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Throgs Neck residents for years with humane, effective squirrel removal solutions tailored to this tight-knit community. Our local expertise, combined with guaranteed results and full licensing, makes us the trusted choice for protecting your Throgs Neck home from squirrel damage and contamination.
localContext: Throgs Neck's proximity to the Long Island Sound and abundance of mature trees in neighborhoods near Fort Schuyler and Bicentennial Veterans Memorial Park make it particularly attractive to squirrel populations. The area's mix of single-family homes, many with older construction and accessible roof lines, often provides easy entry points for squirrels seeking warm attic spaces during colder months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Throgs Neck typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and required exclusion work. This includes humane trapping, full property inspection, entry point sealing, and sanitation services to ensure squirrels don't return.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Throgs Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Throgs Neck's abundant oak and maple trees provide natural food sources, while the neighborhood's older homes often have small gaps in soffits, vents, and roof joints that squirrels exploit. The waterfront location and proximity to parks create ideal squirrel habitats, and attics offer warm, safe nesting sites especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Throgs Neck home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Throgs Neck are completed within 3-7 days, though this varies based on the number of squirrels and complexity of entry points. We begin with same-day or next-day inspection, followed by immediate trap placement and exclusion work to prevent re-entry while humanely removing all squirrels from your property.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Throgs Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage to Throgs Neck homes by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing on wooden beams and siding, and contaminating attics with urine and feces. They can also destroy roof shingles and fascia boards while creating entry points, leading to water damage and providing access for other pests.
